billing_account.description: Specifies the ID of the Google Cloud billing account to associate with resources; must be an active billing account.

display_name.description: Name displayed for the billing account, must be unique and descriptive.

lookup_projects.description: Specifies the list of project IDs or names to check for billing account linkage.

open.description: Determines whether the billing account is open or closed; must be set to true for active accounts.
